class PriorityQueue:
    def __init__(self):
        self.items = []

    def push(self, item, priority):
        self.items.append((priority, item))
        self.items.sort(key=lambda x: x[0])

    def pop(self):
        return self.items.pop(0)

    def peek(self):
        return self.items[0] if self.items else None


def process_tasks(tasks: list) -> list:
    pq = PriorityQueue()
    for task in tasks:
        pq.push(task, task.priority)
    results = []
    while pq.items:
        _, task = pq.pop()
        results.append(execute(task))
    return results
